source.notes: Commodore 1084S — 0.42 mm SLOT mask (not shadow trio — slot type confirmed by crtdatabase and corroborated by Philips CM8833 OEM service manual). 13" viewable on 14" tube. PAL-first Amiga monitor; 15.625 kHz/50 Hz native + 15.75 kHz/60 Hz NTSC alt.

EBU phosphor set (Tech 3213) — 1084S is a PAL-first European monitor, EBU primaries fit the tube better than SMPTE-C NTSC primaries. Per-channel decay typical of P22 colour triplet: R ~1 ms, G ~2 ms, B ~1 ms (the green a touch slower on consumer-grade P22).
